system.flavor: You pull tendrils of mist around you, ready to lash out and steal the moisture from your foe's body.
system.effect:
Effect one use of the following interrupt until the start of your next turn.

Withering Tendrils
Interrupt 1, burst 2 (self)
Trigger character enters or exits a space in the area.
Effect[X]: Push all characters in the area 1d3, interrupting but not stopping any movement. Affected characters with vigor are pushed +2 more spaces, then lose vigor equal to the spaces they were pushed.
Impact gain slow.

(Impact on any character forcibly moved into an obstruction as part of this ability.)
